Welcome to Hotel Margarita Beach

MARGARITA BEACH HOTEL is the ideal residence for your holidays, situated directly on the beach , 20 km south of Capital Kerkyra.

The beach and the sea in front of our hotel is waiting to offer you unique refreshing moments of pleasure and relaxation. You can swim in our swimming pool, relax in our gardens full of flowers and enjoy the famous greek hospitality.

The extensive garden is situated throughout the whole complex. Green plants, fruit trees and a large variety of colorful and traditional flowers are everywhere around you, making the picture of paradise complete.

The MARGARITA BEACH HOTEL location is ideal, with a panoramic view overlooking Ionian sea. The traditional village of Moraitika nearby, offers the opportunity for shopping, dining at local tavernas and restaurants, and sightseeing, combined with the night life all within walking distance.

Our well-trained staff is always at your disposal, willing to offer you services and information regarding the area.

All of our visitors are pleased by our hotel’s exceptional service and facilities as well as by the friendly atmosphere that guarantee unforgettable vacations.

“We will make sure you enjoy your holiday at our place!.”

Book a Room - Check for Availability - Ask Information & Rates

At Margarita hotel we are ready to welcome you and offer you a perfect vacation in Greece.

Please, complete our CONTACT form with your request and we will reply to you as soon as possible.

Enquiries without an e-mail address cannot be processed!

For further information about our Hotel, reservations etc., please, do not hesitate to contact us. We will be more than happy to be of any assistance to you.

Completing the reservation form puts you under no obligation. We will reply within the next hours (maximum 24h*) to let you know whether the accommodation you have requested is available. In order for us to hold/ confirm/ guarantee the reservation.
